name: USB Tethering cannot connect (can still ping device) - AudioRelay
snippet: My device is rooted (Magisk). The USB tethering function itself works well and when I ping my phones ip from my PC, the response time is 1ms.

snippet:

name: AudioRelay: Stream audio & mic - Apps on Google Play
snippet:
Easily receive all your PC audio over Wi-Fi or USB. Listen wirelessly to music, movies, or games on your Android device with low delay.
Listen to your PC audio, use your phone as a mic or stream audio from your phone. ... Easily receive all your PC audio over Wi-Fi or USB.
